description: Type widening in UNION — result uses the wider type
name: cast_union_type_widening
note: Type widening in UNION — result uses the wider type
query_sql:
-- @name GetAllNums
-- @returns :many
SELECT val FROM small_nums UNION ALL SELECT val FROM big_nums
schema_sql: CREATE TABLE small_nums (val SMALLINT NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE big_nums (val BIGINT NOT NULL);
